blended.narrative: Troll Resort is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,882 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
